story.title: Coliseo Romano · Civilizational Continuity
story.hook: Two thousand years ago, fifty thousand voices roared from these stones.
story.meaning: What survives is not the empire but the architecture of an idea: a place where a city held its breath together.

sources.title: UNESCO World Heritage List · Historic Centre of Rome
